rationale: Shift the default training context from 1024 to 512 so the Mac mini spends far less FLOPs per token on attention and can buy materially more optimizer steps inside the same 600s wallclock. I paired that with a shorter Muon momentum warmup and a longer warmdown window so the optimizer schedule matches a run that still only gets tens of steps, not hundreds.
title: shorter-context-step-budget-pass
